Metadata.title: Wecacha · Son La Coffee
Metadata.description: Premium Son La coffee from Vietnam, slow roasted with the atmosphere of misty northwest mountains and handcrafted culture.
Metadata.keywords: Son La coffee, Vietnamese coffee, northwest Vietnam coffee, specialty coffee, arabica Son La

Home.heroTitle: Specialty Arabica Son La – The Essence of Thai Culture
Home.heroCopy: Where highland terroir meets the meticulous care of the Thai people to nurture a premium Arabica. We deliver authentic, unflavored roasted beans that carry the full, unique flavor of the Northwest highlands.
Home.storyTitle: Specialty Arabica Son La – When Centuries of Culture Infuse Every Bean
Home.storyCopy: Nestled at the ideal altitude under year-round cloud cover, Son La is one of the few places in Vietnam with the perfect conditions to produce world-class specialty Arabica coffee.
Home.storyQuote: The Thai people nurture Arabica with a century of cultural wisdom, creating beans with a character uniquely their own.
Home.storyBody: For the Thai community, Arabica has taken root alongside their villages for decades. With their innate gentleness, respect for nature, and meticulous care — the same spirit with which they weave their vibrant Pieu scarves — they tend every single coffee plant with the same devotion.
Home.cultureCopy: We do not just sell specialty Arabica beans from Son La — we preserve roots and celebrate the unique cultural identity of the growing region.
Home.cultureQuote: A clean, refreshing acidity like morning mist, enchanting forest flower notes, and a deep, lingering sweetness like the rhythm of a nighttime Xoe dance.
Home.productsTitle: The taste of a mountain region
Home.footerCta: Arabica — the essence of Thai culture.
Home.statAltCaption: High-quality Arabica growing zone of Son La
Home.statFarmersCaption: Total Son La coffee cultivation area
Home.statRoastCaption: Nearly half of Vietnam's total Arabica area
Home.coreValuesTitle: Specialty Arabica Son La – More Than Just a Coffee Bean
Home.coreVal1Copy: We do not just sell Arabica beans — we protect our roots. We are committed to partnering with the Thai community to preserve the natural ecosystem and celebrate the unique cultural values of the Son La growing region.
Home.coreVal2Copy: The decades-long journey of Arabica on Son La soil is an invaluable heritage. We honor the past, preserve traditional farming practices, while applying modern technology to bring specialty Arabica Son La to the most demanding international standards.
Home.coreVal3Title: Honoring the Stories of Thai Farmers
Home.coreVal3Copy: Every Arabica bean carries a story of dedication. We celebrate the sweat, patience and pure hearts of the Thai community — the quiet highland artisans who breathe soul into every harvest season.
Home.coreVal4Title: Every Growing Region – A Distinct Cultural Identity
Home.coreVal4Copy: For us, every village is its own distinct flavor territory. Arabica not only carries the character of each region's terroir, but in every aromatic note you can also sense the warmth of a stilt-house fire and the heartfelt hospitality of the people there.
Home.productsCopy: Focused entirely on high-quality unflavored roasted beans, categorized by flavor profile.
Home.prod1Profile: Clean rustic acidity, natural forest flower notes, smooth finish with a prolonged gentle sweetness.
Home.prod1Story: Selected from the oldest Arabica farms of the Thai people in villages at the highest altitudes.
Home.prod2Profile: Bold and rich, with an intense aroma and hints of ripe tropical fruit and wild honey.
Home.prod2Story: The crystallization of 100% hand-picked ripe cherries and traditional hand-processing by the local community.
Home.commitmentCopy: Building absolute trust with discerning coffee lovers.
Home.commit1Copy: The Thai community selects only hand-picked ripe cherries to ensure the highest uniformity and quality for every specialty coffee bean.
Home.commit2Copy: Wecacha partners with organizations and communities to support women and children, promote gender equality and create employment for highland families.
Home.commit3Copy: Advanced roasting technology fully awakens the natural floral and fruity notes of Son La Arabica, with an absolute commitment to zero additives.

Story.title: The Son La story in the mist
Story.intro: Where clouds rest on mountain shoulders, coffee cherries ripen slowly to the sound of wind and village stories.
Story.quote: A good cup of coffee does not begin at the brewer. It begins on a cold morning, when a farmer walks into the farm while mist still rests on the leaves.
Story.chapterTwo: Hands that pick only ripe cherries
Story.chapterFour: Slow roasting to keep the mountains close

Shop.title: Buy Specialty Arabica Coffee Son La – Wecacha
Shop.intro: Choose the bean, the roast and the way a mountain morning enters your daily ritual.

Product.journeyTitle: Every bag has its own route
Product.journeyCopy: From origin and processing to roast rhythm, this product carries a story no other lot shares.
Product.boldFlavorCopy: Lightly bitter cacao note, deep sweet finish, perfectly balanced.
Product.naturalAromaCopy: A hint of dry herbs, evoking the northwest highlands.
Product.perfectPhinCopy: Optimized design for full coffee flavor extraction.
Product.storageValue: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

Explore.title: Explore the northwest through coffee
Explore.intro: A field journal of photography, short reels and a map of the places behind Son La flavor.
Explore.farmDesc: From 1,050m above sea level, where coffee trees absorb the full essence of earth and sky.
Explore.processingDesc: Strict at every step: from 100% hand-picked ripe cherries to natural fermentation.
Explore.cultureArticleDesc: Coffee is not just a drink, it is the rhythm and story of highland communities.
Explore.heroTitle1: A journey from the cloud gardens
Explore.heroCopy1: Discover the origin, roasting philosophy and the people behind every specialty Son La coffee bean.
Explore.heroCopy2: A story of dedication and passion.
Explore.coffeeCultureDesc: Explore the depth of coffee through the lens of history and modern living.
Explore.eventsDesc: Join Wecacha at launch events, workshops and village journeys.
Explore.recipesDesc: Secrets to brew a perfect cup at home, just like the experts.

About.heroCopy: WECACHA is a coffee and tea concept focused on providing customers with high-quality products, outstanding utility services, and reasonable prices.
About.harmonyTitle: WECACHA – Create change, continue the essence
About.harmonyPara1: WECACHA is a coffee and tea concept focused on providing customers with high-quality products, outstanding utility services, and reasonable prices. We understand that every customer desires to enjoy delicious coffee and refreshing tea without worrying about price or convenience.
About.harmonyPara2: We are not just a typical coffee or tea shop, but a place for you to find relaxation, connection with yourself and life, or a creative space to meet and exchange with friends and partners.
About.harmonyPara3: With the slogan “We can change” – together we create change, we believe that every cup of tea or coffee carries a story about the natural beauty of the land blended with cultural beauty and laborious hands. The essence of heaven and earth, the delicacy of humanity. WECACHA promises to be the ideal destination for those who love the interesting, delicate, and diverse beauty in every moment of enjoying products.
About.visionCopy: To become a leading coffee and tea brand, distinguished by high-quality products and premium customer experiences, while expanding our network internationally.
About.missionTagline: Delivering sophisticated experiences and honoring Vietnamese ingredients.
About.missionBullet1: Delivering an inspiring, delicate, and high-quality coffee and tea tasting experience.
About.missionBullet2: Honoring Vietnamese ingredients through meticulously selected and innovated products.
About.missionBullet3: Creating a relaxing space for connection, and building a community where every customer is cherished.
About.value1Copy: Always focusing on listening to feedback and providing genuine value and dedicated service to maximize customer benefits.
About.value2Copy: Encouraging creative thinking, applying advanced technology to develop unique products that meet diverse needs.
About.value3Copy: Honest in transactions, adhering to high ethical standards with clear origins and deep social responsibility.
About.value4Copy: Investing in training, creating promotion opportunities, and building a positive, supportive corporate culture.
About.ctaTitle: Join Wecacha into the new season
About.ctaCopy: Explore our range of coffee products meticulously selected from the best growing regions in Son La.
About.farmersPara1: Behind every cup of Wecacha coffee is the effort of hundreds of ethnic minority farming households in Son La. They are not just farmers – they are artisans of the mountains.
About.farmersPara2: 100% hand-selective picking of ripe cherries requires extraordinary patience. Walking steep hillsides in cold mist, carefully selecting each ruby-red cherry to ensure the highest natural sugar content.
About.farmersQuote: "The coffee tree cannot speak, but it repays those who tend it with the sweetest ripe fruit."
About.storyConclCopy: From the high gardens of Moc Chau to the roastery in Muong La, the story of Son La now rests entirely in your cup.

News.title: News & Updates
News.copy: Latest stories about coffee, events, and special recipes from Son La.
News.empty: No articles have been published yet.

Philosophy.respectTitle: Respect the origin, awaken the potential
Philosophy.respectPara1: At Wecacha, we don't see roasting as 'cooking' the beans. Roasting is a dialogue with the green coffee beans, listening to their cellular structure and deciding the perfect moment to stop.
Philosophy.respectPara2: We apply the Slow Roast philosophy. Extending the flavor development time highlights natural sweetness, reduces harsh acidity, and fully preserves the delicate fruity notes of the Son La terroir.
Philosophy.heatControlDesc: Roast profile tailored for each harvest batch.
Philosophy.timeDesc: Developed long enough to fully caramelize natural sugars.
Philosophy.coolingDesc: Locking in the aroma exactly when the beans reach perfect maturity.

Footer.tagline: Arabica — the essence of Thai culture.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Sơn La Coffee. Crafted for mountain mornings.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about Son La Coffee products and services.
Faq.q1: What makes Son La coffee special?
Faq.a1: Son La coffee is grown at an altitude of 1,500m above sea level, surrounded by fog year-round. This unique microclimate allows the coffee cherries (especially Arabica) to mature slowly, developing rich flavor notes of ripe plum, floral, and wild honey.
Faq.a2: We use traditional, artisanal unflavored roasting methods. No butter or artificial flavorings are added, preserving the authentic taste of the Northwest highlands.
Faq.a3: Standard shipping takes 2-3 days for Hanoi & HCMC, and 4-5 days for other provinces. Coffee is freshly roasted immediately after you place an order.
Faq.a4: Yes. When ordering, you can select whole beans or specify a grind size tailored to your brewing method (Phin, Espresso, Pour Over, Cold Brew...).

ReturnPolicy.title: Return Policy
ReturnPolicy.tagline: Sơn La Coffee – Premium Vietnamese coffee.
ReturnPolicy.subtitle: Committed to delivering the perfect coffee experience to you.
ReturnPolicy.conditionDesc: We accept returns within 7 days of receipt if: The packaging is torn or the seal is broken; The coffee is moldy or spoiled due to our storage fault; The wrong product was delivered (wrong beans, wrong roast/grind).
ReturnPolicy.processDesc: Please contact us via Zalo or Hotline with an unboxing video/photos and the product condition. We will promptly send a replacement completely free of charge.
ReturnPolicy.noteDesc: We do not accept returns for cases where customers change their mind or do not prefer the personal taste profile, due to the specific nature of specialty unflavored roasted coffee.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.subtitle: How we protect and use your data
PrivacyPolicy.section1Desc: When you visit or shop at Wecacha, we may collect personal information including: Full name, phone number, email address, delivery address, and purchase history. This collection is solely to enhance your experience.
PrivacyPolicy.section2Desc: Your information is mainly used to process orders, support delivery, and customer care. In addition, we may send marketing emails about promotions and new products (only if you opt-in).
PrivacyPolicy.section3Desc: Wecacha is committed to NOT selling or trading your data. We only share the most necessary information with trusted partners such as shipping companies (for delivery) and online payment gateways (for secure transactions).
PrivacyPolicy.section4Desc: You have the full right to request us to extract, edit, or completely delete your personal information from the Wecacha system at any time by contacting us via our Hotline or Support Email.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.subtitle: Rules and agreements when using our services
TermsOfService.section1Desc: These terms apply to all customers who access, register an account, or shop on the Wecacha website system. By using the website, you agree to abide by the rules below.
TermsOfService.section2Desc: Customers are obliged to provide accurate delivery information and make payments on time. Wecacha is responsible for providing products with the committed quality, careful packaging, and supporting all inquiries during the shopping process.
TermsOfService.section3Desc: All content, images, logos, and designs on this website are copyrighted by Wecacha. Copying or using them for commercial purposes without written permission is a violation of the law.
TermsOfService.section4Desc: Any arising issues or disputes during transactions will be prioritized by Wecacha to be resolved through negotiation and mediation, ensuring the highest benefits for customers in accordance with the laws of Vietnam.
